particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, bookdebts, plant & machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

persons_entitled.name: Sir Michael Charles Gerrard Peat Kcvo, Philip Alan Reid, Kevin John Selwyn Knott Cvo and Theright Honourable Nathaniel Charles Jacob Baron Rothschild Om Gbe
